title: CraftKeeper Plugin Catalog
description: The versioned JSON contract shared by carmelosantana/minecraft-plugin-catalog (the independent catalog repository, which validates every contribution against this exact schema in its own CI) and CraftKeeper's App\Catalog\Sources\CraftKeeperCatalogSource, which reads it. See docs/architecture/plugin-catalog.md for the handoff. additionalProperties is deliberately left permissive (true) at every level so a future catalog can add optional fields without breaking older CraftKeeper installs pinned to an older contract version — only the fields listed here as required are load-bearing.

catalogVersion.description: Semantic version of THIS JSON contract (not of any individual plugin release).

generatedAt.description: When the catalog repository's build produced this document. Optional but recommended.

slug.description: Stable, unique-within-catalog identifier. This is the project identity half of App\Catalog\Data\PluginReleaseId's dedup key (source + projectId) — never the display name.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the exact downloadable artifact. This is the EXPECTED hash CraftKeeper carries; Task 15 is responsible for verifying a downloaded artifact against it.

withdrawn.description: true if the catalog maintainers pulled this release (e.g. a security issue). Withdrawn releases are still schema-valid and immutable by checksum — they are excluded from active search results but remain individually resolvable so an already-installed withdrawn version can still be identified/inspected.

signature.description: Present only when the catalog repository signed this release's artifact. Optional at the release level, but every field here is required once a signature object is present at all.
